title: crossonephelis africanus
intro: Crossonephelis africanus, also known as the African crossonephelis, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Crossonephelis africanus include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as acting as a natural remedy for wounds and infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
